name: Chinese Barbecued Baby Back Ribs
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Pork back ribs, cut into 1-inch wide by 3-inch long pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ribs in a nonreactive, plastic bowl with a lid.
2. In a separate bowl, combine marinade ingredients: sugar, sherry, hoisin sauce, garlic, salt (if desired), and ketchup. Mix well.
3. Spoon the marinade over the ribs. Place the cover on the bowl and shake to coat the ribs thoroughly with the marinade.
4. Place in refrigerator and marinate for 4 hours or longer. Shake once or twice while marinating to coat again.
5. Cover a cookie sheet with aluminum foil to avoid mess.
6. Take ribs from the refrigerator and shake to coat again.
7. Place ribs on their sides on the cookie sheet. Don't crowd, or they won't be crispy.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
9. Turn over the ribs with tongs and bake an additional 20-30 minutes.
10. Check carefully during the last 10 minutes of baking to prevent burning.
